title: Canopy Growth Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2023 Financial Results
text: Canopy Growth reported fiscal year 2023 results. FY2023 net revenue declined 21% year-over-year to $403 million CAD. Q4 FY2023 revenue fell 14% to $87.5 million CAD. Adjusted for divestitures, underlying revenue decline was 11%. Net loss of $3.31 billion for FY2023 versus $331 million loss in FY2022. Adjusted EBITDA loss of $350 million improved from $426 million loss in FY2022. Q4 adjusted gross margin was negative 18% after excluding restructuring charges. Fiscal 2023 was a transformational year for Canopy Growth as they began to implement a comprehensive strategy to accelerate their path to profitability. Key actions completed: Divested Canadian retail operations, ceased cannabis cultivation at multiple facilities, reduced headcount by over 1,200 positions. Targeted $240-$310 million in cost reductions by end of FY2024. The company reduced debt by approximately $500 million from Q2 FY2023 through Q1 FY2024. Cash position stood at $783 million at fiscal year-end. Canadian medical cannabis revenue grew 6% year-over-year.
